# Welcome {.unnumbered}

This is an unofficial web edition of the **Dominions 6** manual, transcribed from the
[official PDF](https://www.illwinter.com/dom6/dom6manual.pdf) into a searchable,
navigable website.

Use the sidebar to browse chapters, or the search box to jump to any topic.

::: callout-important
Dominions 6 and its manual are the property of **Illwinter Game Design**. This site is
a fan-made reformatting of the manual for easier reading and is not affiliated with or
endorsed by Illwinter.
:::

## Contents at a glance

- **Core Rules** -- the introduction, basics, pretenders, units, movement, combat,
  magic, and dominion.
- **Nations** -- the origins of the nations.
- **Magic Reference** -- magic items, path boosters, battlefield spells, summoning
  rituals, global enchantments, and other rituals.
- **Nation Index** -- detailed entries for every nation.
- **Appendix** -- launch options.
